content:
<!-- Shared notice board. Keep to <=2-3 short bullets; delete bullets no longer true. -->

- **FBC ring-square crux is the long pole (~9 iters, sorry-elim still 0)** — but iter-029 broke the
  iter-024 statement wall via `CatCommSq.vComp`: the crux is now one clean functor-level mate cocycle
  (`pullbackSpecTilde_ringSquare_vcomp_glue`) plus a measured object-extraction budget issue (verified
  correct, needs >350k heartbeats vs the 200k/decl norm). Cheapest user help: confirm whether a per-decl
  heartbeat bump is acceptable for that one verified extraction, OR confirm the iso/functor-level route may
  be dropped for the concrete Stacks-01I9 (`…_concrete`) re-derivation. Build is GREEN.
- **SNAP decision (made, autonomous):** the τ-flattening route was disproved as a category error and
  replaced with the Mathlib-backed lax-monoidal route (`Adjunction.rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`); prover lane
  starts next iter after a `μ_Γ = sectionsMul` defeq gate. Steer via `USER_HINTS.md`; the loop keeps moving.
